SpaceX shares rose in premarket trading, helping boost risk-on sentiment.

title: US and Iran Agree to Halt War, SpaceX Jumps | The Pulse 6/15/2026

summary:
"The Pulse With Francine Lacqua" is all about conversations with high profile guests in the beating heart of global business, economics, finance and politics. Based in London, we go wherever the story is, bringing you exclusive interviews and market-moving scoops.

Today's guests: Tina Fordham, Fordham Global Foresight Founder & Geopolitical Strategist; Karen Ward, JPMorgan Asset Management EMEA Chief Market Strategist; Maxim Timchenko, DTEK Group CEO (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Stocks and Bonds Rally on US-Iran Deal | The Opening Trade 6/15/2026
title_cn: 美伊协议推动股市和债券上涨开盘交易 6/15/2026
summary:
A global relief rally drove stocks and bonds higher while oil tumbled to a three-month low after the US and Iran agreed to end their war and reopen the Strait of Hormuz. President Trump said the waterway will reopen upon the signing of the deal on Friday. The event would then trigger the start of 60 days of talks on Iran’s nuclear program.

The Opening Trade has everything you need to know as markets open across Europe. With analysis you won't find anywhere else, we break down the biggest stories of the day and speak to top guests who have skin in the game. Hosted by Anna Edwards, Guy Johnson and Tom Mackenzie. (Source: Bloomberg)

title_cn: 加密代币的消失显示了人工智能黑客威胁的严重性
summary: When Eli Ben-Sasson helped create the Zcash cryptocurrency nearly a decade ago, the cryptographer worried about human adversaries. He didn’t expect that machine intelligence would one day expose a flaw that had eluded years of expert human judgment.

title: Tencent-Backed Enflame Heads to IPO as China AI Chip Wave Grows

summary: Tencent Holdings Ltd.-backed Shanghai Enflame Technology Co. has received approval for an initial public offering, a key step toward bringing to the market the last of the “four little dragons,” a group of leading artificial intelligence chipmakers.

title: Carmen Li's Plan to Build a Futures Market for Compute | Odd Lots
title_cn: Carmen Li 建立计算期货市场的计划 |零股
summary: When we spoke to DRW's Don Wilson last year, he talked about building out a GPU market that might be bigger than oil. Now, a year later, he is working with Carmen Li to do just that. Li is the CEO of two companies — Silicon Data and Compute Exchange (where she works alongside Wilson). The former company is building the index for GPU pricing while the latter is a spot marketplace for GPU procurement. Today's episode — recorded at our live show at City Winery in New York — gets into how Li is building a whole new market for GPUs at her two companies. We talk about the challenge of standardizing compute, GPU price volatility, if used GPUs are like used cars, what goes into constructing a GPU index, and what it means to win the GPU lottery. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Torsten Slok Shows Us How AI Is Eating the Entire US Economy | Odd Lots
title_cn: Torsten Slok 向我们展示人工智能如何吞噬整个美国经济零股
summary: Apollo Global Management's chief economist Torsten Slok is known as the "King of Charts." That's why during our most recent show, at City Winery in New York, we invited him to do a presentation, on stage, for the live audience. In this bonus video-only episode, he dives into how AI has eaten up the entire US economy. His slide deck charts includes information on the massive data center build out, what's driving growth in the US economy, the industrial renaissance kicked off by the CHIPS Act, and AI's effect on GDP. In some ways, the conversation was almost prescient: He predicted that nonfarm payrolls would rise, and indeed, they came in pretty hot last week. Just as important is his investment advice: It used to be conventional wisdom that a diversified portfolio was something like 60% stocks, 40% bonds. But now that AI has shown up in both equity and bonds, he says the new 60/40 is going to be AI vs non-AI. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Anthropic Restricts Mythos After US Order
title_cn: 美国命令后人择限制神话
summary:
Anthropic has shut off access to its most advanced AI models after a Trump administration order citing national security concerns. The move could set a major precedent for AI regulation, with implications for OpenAI, Google, Meta and beyond.

 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Starmer Announces Full Ban on Social Media for UK’s Under 16s
title_cn: Starmer 宣布全面禁止英国 16 岁以下青少年使用社交媒体
summary: Prime Minister Keir Starmer announced what he described as a “full ban” on children using social media, one of the strictest online crackdowns in the democratic world and going beyond limits imposed by Australia last year.

title: US Orders Anthropic to Block Foreign Access to Mythos
title_cn: 美国命令 Anthropic 阻止外国访问神话
summary: The US government has ordered Anthropic PBC to disable access to its most advanced AI models, such as Mythos and Fable 5, for all foreign nationals. The order comes after the US government discovered it’s possible to “jailbreak,” or bypass the guardrails, of the Fable 5. Bloomberg's Neil Campling reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Kazakhstan, Firebird Ink $10 Billion AI Deal With Nvidia Support
title_cn: 哈萨克斯坦与 Firebird 签署 100 亿美元 AI 协议并获得 Nvidia 支持

title: Anthropic Block Marks US Reversal, Warning to Silicon Valley
title_cn: 人择区块标志着美国的逆转，对硅谷的警告
summary: The extraordinary move by the US to bar foreign access to Anthropic PBC’s best AI models underscores the Trump administration’s newfound willingness to exert control over a pivotal industry. It also reminds Silicon Valley that it’s working with an imperfectly understood technology with uncertain impact.

title: Macron’s G7 Legacy Hangs on Fickle AI Funding and Data Centers

summary: With less than a year left in office, Emmanuel Macron wants to be remembered as the French president who put Europe back in the technology race.

title: 新SiriはアップルAI危機を救えるか、実機を試して見えた7つの改善例－Power On
title_cn: 新的 Siri 能否拯救苹果的人工智能危机？实际设备测试后发现的 7 项改进 - 开机
summary: アップルの新Siriは2年遅れで登場したものの、実用性が十分な水準に達し、AI戦略立て直しの足掛かりとなりつつある。

title: Top Banks Rush to Fill Chief AI Roles as Talent Jumps to Rivals
title_cn: 随着人才涌向竞争对手，顶级银行纷纷填补首席人工智能职位
summary: Banks from Sydney to London are racing to fill the senior role of chief AI officer, a job that barely existed a year ago. Those in the position, however, say it might not be around for long.

title: Activist Palliser Urges Taiwan Firm WUS to Privatize, Lift Value
title_cn: 活动人士 Palliser 敦促台湾公司 WUS 私有化，提升价值
summary: Activist hedge fund Palliser Capital is urging Taiwanese company WUS Printed Circuit Co. to enhance shareholder value, including through a potential privatization, according to documents viewed by Bloomberg News.

title: Jack Ma-Backed Ant Group Set for High-Stakes Overhaul of Billion-User App
title_cn: 马云支持的蚂蚁集团将对数十亿用户的应用程序进行高风险的改革
summary: Ant Group Co. is testing an overhaul to its Alipay super app that would introduce an AI agent interface, a major escalation in its battle for users with archrival WeChat.

title: South Korea’s Floundering Movie Business Turns to AI for Help
title_cn: 韩国陷入困境的电影业向人工智能求助
summary: Two films built largely with generative AI tools are on view in South Korean theaters

title: Carney Says Anthropic Ban Shows Risk of Relying on Big AI Models
title_cn: 卡尼表示人为禁令显示了依赖大人工智能模型的风险
summary: Prime Minister Mark Carney said the US export ban blocking all foreign access to Anthropic PBC’s latest artificial intelligence models underscores the risk of depending on just a handful of powerful AI tools.

title: Apple’s New Siri Is Just Good Enough to Ease Its AI Crisis
title_cn: 苹果的新 Siri 足以缓解人工智能危机
summary: The company prepares for the foldable iPhone and touch-screen MacBook.

title: How Google Is Reinventing Search with AI
title_cn: 谷歌如何利用人工智能重塑搜索
summary: Google is making the biggest change to its search business in more than two decades, integrating AI-generated answers, conversational search, and reasoning tools directly into the heart of its search product, which has shaped the course of content and the internet.. Nick Fox, Google’s Senior Vice President of Knowledge and Information, argues that AI allows users to ask more complex questions and get faster, more useful answers while still connecting people to content across the web. But, for creators and publishers, fewer keystrokes could make a difference. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI Turns Coders, Lawyers and Analysts Into Ghosts of London’s Past
title_cn: 人工智能将程序员、律师和分析师变成伦敦过去的幽灵
summary: Search for “finance analyst” and you’re likely to find around 80 vacancies in London, according to a prominent recruitment website. If that seems like a surprisingly low number for one of the world’s biggest banking and corporate hubs, it’s because it is — four years earlier, the same website featured more than 350 of these roles.

title: UK to Announce Social Media Ban for Teens This Week, Nandy Says
title_cn: 南迪说，英国本周将宣布青少年社交媒体禁令
summary: A UK ban on under-16s using social media set to be unveiled this week is not “a silver bullet” but will have “a significant role to play” in keeping children safe, Culture Secretary Lisa Nandy told Sky News on Sunday.

title: SpaceX Surge Further Boosts Saudi Billionaire Prince’s Fortune
title_cn: SpaceX 的激增进一步增加了沙特亿万富翁王子的财富
summary: Friday’s debut share surge for SpaceX is bolstering the fortunes of one of Saudi Arabia’s richest men.

title: Starmer to Meet Japan’s Takaichi as Fighter Jet Funding Sputters
title_cn: 随着战斗机资金的减少，斯塔默将与日本高市会面
summary: British Prime Minister Keir Starmer will meet his Japanese counterpart Sanae Takaichi on Sunday as uncertainty mounts over their joint fighter jet program with Italy because of doubts about the UK’s commitment.

title: Global Capitalism Bets It All on AI Future Alarming Voters
title_cn: 全球资本主义将全部赌注押在人工智能的未来上，令选民震惊
summary: Days after filing confidentially to go public, Anthropic, the $965 billion artificial intelligence juggernaut that’s one of the fastest-growing startups of all time, dropped another bombshell.

title: Questions Linger Over US-Iran Deal As Trump Heads to G7
title_cn: 特朗普前往七国集团之际，美伊协议仍存疑问
summary: The president has pressed hard for a win, but many thorny issues remain

title: German Bank Chief Warns Rising Extremism Threatens Investment
title_cn: 德国银行行长警告极端主义抬头威胁投资
summary: The head of Germany’s state development bank warned that a rising tide of political extremism poses a threat to foreign investment in Europe’s biggest economy.

title: G7 Leaders Gather in France With AI and Iran on Agenda
title_cn: 七国集团领导人齐聚法国，讨论人工智能和伊朗问题
summary: Get the latest updates from the G7 Leaders' Summit in Evian, France.

title: UK Government Wins Appeal Over Palestine Action Terror Ban
title_cn: 英国政府赢得对巴勒斯坦行动恐怖禁令的上诉
summary: The UK ban on Palestine Action under anti-terror laws was lawful and proportionate the Court of Appeal ruled, in a boost for the government’s contentious response to pro-Palestinian activism.

title: Senegal’s Sonko Tones Down Stance on Debt, Sounds IMF Optimism
title_cn: 塞内加尔桑科缓和债务立场，听起来国际货币基金组织乐观
summary: Senegal’s National Assembly will assess any solutions for the country’s debt challenges, including a possible restructure of billions of dollars in loans, on whether they advance a broader economic-transformation agenda, Speaker Ousmane Sonko said.

title: A Sidelined G7 Awaits Trump’s Triumphant Arrival
title_cn: 旁观的七国集团等待特朗普凯旋
summary: The forum created to solve geopolitical crises was excluded from the US-Israeli planning for war on Iran and the diplomacy to end it.

title: US and Iran Say They’ve Agreed Deal to Reopen Hormuz This Week
title_cn: 美国和伊朗表示已达成协议，本周重新开放霍尔木兹海峡
summary: The US and Iran said they reached an interim peace agreement to reopen the Strait of Hormuz and move further toward ending a 15-week war that’s wrought chaos across the Middle East and reverberated through the global economy.

title: Russia Strikes UNESCO-Protected Cathedral in Kyiv
title_cn: 俄罗斯袭击了受联合国教科文组织保护的基辅大教堂
summary: Ukraine said a historic UNESCO-protected Orthodox cathedral in Kyiv was hit by a Russian drone and missile strike early on Monday. The Kremlin's latest barrage killed four people and injured about 30 as it set apartment buildings in several parts of the city ablaze, according to local authorities and the Emergencies Ministry. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Ukraine and Moldova to Start First Phase of EU Membership Talks
title_cn: 乌克兰和摩尔多瓦将启动第一阶段欧盟成员资格谈判
summary: Ukraine and Moldova will launch the first portion of European Union membership talks, finally advancing after Hungary spent years blocking the process.

title: Pakistan to Host US-Iran Peace Deal Event in Geneva, Sharif Says
title_cn: 谢里夫表示，巴基斯坦将在日内瓦主办美伊和平协议活动
summary: Pakistan will host an event in Geneva to mark the US-Iran peace deal, Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif told parliament, crediting Army Chief Asim Munir with playing an “extraordinary role” in efforts to end a conflict that threatened to destabilize the global economy.

title: Europe Says Ready for Hormuz Mission Once Iran Peace in Place
title_cn: 欧洲表示一旦伊朗实现和平就准备好执行霍尔木兹任务
summary: European leaders said they’re ready to deploy military assets to reopen the Strait of Hormuz once the peace agreement announced between the US and Iran is implemented.

title: Hard to See Burnham Trade Being Pound-Friendly, SocGen Says
title_cn: 法国兴业银行表示，很难看到伯纳姆交易对英镑有利
summary: Kit Juckes, chief FX strategist at Societe Generale, discusses the outlook for this week's UK by-election and the potential impact of a leadership bid by Andy Burnham, who is trying to win a seat in parliament in Thursday's vote in Makerfield, north-west England. "It's hard to see the Burnham trade on week one, particularly if say he changes chancellor, good example, being sterling-friendly," Juckes tells Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Russia Hits Kyiv’s UNESCO Site Hours After Putin-Trump Call
title_cn: 普京与特朗普通话几小时后，俄罗斯袭击了基辅的联合国教科文组织遗址
summary: Ukraine said a historic UNESCO-protected Orthodox cathedral in Kyiv was hit in the latest Russian drone and missile strike early on Monday, hours after Vladimir Putin and Donald Trump held a phone call.

title: US-Iran Deal to Dominate G7 Meeting in France
title_cn: 美伊协议将主导法国七国集团会议
summary: President Emmanuel Macron hosts the G7 summit in France this week, a meeting between heads of state that is set to be dominated by the US-Iran agreement on an interim deal to reopen the Strait of Hormuz. Bloomberg's Oliver Crook reports from Evian. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Starbucks Korea to Close All Stores Early for History Training
title_cn: 韩国星巴克将提前关闭所有门店进行历史培训
summary: Starbucks Korea will take the unprecedented step of closing all stores early on June 22 to conduct history training for its entire workforce following a botched promotional event that triggered a customer boycott.

title: US, Iran Agree to Halt War But Key Questions Unanswered | Daybreak Europe 6/15/2026
title_cn: 美国和伊朗同意停止战争，但关键问题尚未得到解答黎明欧洲 6/15/2026
summary:
Bloomberg Daybreak Europe is your essential morning viewing to stay ahead. Live from London, we set the agenda for your day, catching you up with overnight markets news from the US and Asia. And we'll tell you what matters for investors in Europe, giving you insight before trading begins.

The US and Iran said they reached an interim agreement to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, halting a war that killed thousands of people and setting the stage for 60 days of negotiations on the fate of Tehran’s nuclear program.

Officials from the two countries will meet in Switzerland on June 19 to formally sign the agreement, a decision that suggests aspects of the deal remain unresolved. Neither side has released a text, leaving key sticking points for the next stage of talks.

Today's guest: Sheri Hickok, Climate Impact Partners CEO. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Cape Town Mayor Pushes for Affordable Housing in Reelection Bid
title_cn: 开普敦市长在连任竞选中推动经济适用房
summary: Cape Town’s mayor said he will ramp up efforts to provide more affordable housing and curb electricity price increases if he wins a second term, as he seeks to counter rising living costs in South Africa’s main tourist hub.

title: Switzerland Rejects 10 Million Population Cap Proposal
title_cn: 瑞士拒绝1000万人口上限提案
summary: Swiss voters rejected a proposal to cap the country’s population at 10 million people as economic risks overcame elevated concerns about immigration. A 55% majority accepted warnings from companies and the government that the proposal would have a long-term negative impact on growth. Bloomberg's Bastian Benrath-Wright reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Oil Down on US-Iran Interim Hormuz Deal
title_cn: 美伊霍尔木兹临时协议导致油价下跌
summary: Oil fell after the US and Iran agreed to an interim deal to end their war, potentially allowing the Strait of Hormuz to reopen and easing a supply crunch that has rattled global energy markets. Bloomberg's Stephen Stapczynski reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Swiss Pragmatism Holds as Disputed Population Cap Rejected
title_cn: 瑞士实用主义依然存在，有争议的人口上限被拒绝
summary: Swiss voters opted to play it safe on Sunday, rejecting an unprecedented proposal to cap the country’s population at 10 million people as economic risks overcame elevated concerns about immigration.

title: Hong Kong’s Leader Dodges Questions on Potential Second Term
title_cn: 香港领导人回避有关潜在第二任期的问题
summary: Hong Kong Chief Executive John Lee remained non-committal about seeking a second term, deflecting questions regarding his political future ahead of the city’s leadership selection next year.

title: Asia’s Oil-Thirsty Economies Cautiously Welcome US-Iran Deal
title_cn: 亚洲石油需求旺盛的经济体谨慎欢迎美伊协议
summary: Asia was quick to welcome the US-Iran deal to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, through which most of the region’s energy supplies flow. But many warned it’s too early to say if that will offer long-term relief to the world’s most populous and fastest-growing region.

title: South African Firms Face Pressure Due to Anti-Immigrant Protests
title_cn: 南非公司因反移民抗议而面临压力
summary: South African companies with operations across Africa are facing mounting pressure as anti-immigrant protests in the continent’s largest economy trigger diplomatic tensions and calls for action against their businesses.

title: US and Iran Agree to Halt War, Restart Middle East Oil Shipments
title_cn: 美国和伊朗同意停止战争，重启中东石油运输
summary: The US and Iran said they reached an interim agreement to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, halting a war that killed thousands of people and setting the stage for 60 days of negotiations on the fate of Tehran’s nuclear program.

title: Trump Leaves the Hard Part for Later in Long-Awaited Iran Deal
title_cn: 特朗普将期待已久的伊朗协议中的困难部分留到稍后处理
summary: The US and Iran needed more than two months of fitful, strained negotiations to agree on a deal to halt their fighting and reopen the Strait of Hormuz. Now comes the hard part.

title: Trump Hosts UFC Fights at White House for 80th Birthday
title_cn: 特朗普在白宫举办 UFC 比赛庆祝 80 岁生日
summary: Donald Trump will head to France for what will likely be contentious discussions with world leaders this week, but first he celebrated his 80th birthday by watching a sport that’s more brutal and bloody than politics.

title: US and Iran Reach Deal to Halt the War, Reopen Hormuz
title_cn: 美国和伊朗达成协议停止战争并重新开放霍尔木兹海峡
summary: An F-35B Lighting II takes off from the flight deck of America-class amphibious assault ship USS Tripoli on May 13, 2026.

title: Iran’s Deputy Foreign Minister Confirms Deal Reached With US
title_cn: 伊朗副外长确认与美国达成协议
summary: Iran’s Deputy Foreign Minister Gharibabadi confirms the country reached a peace deal with the US.
